---
title: "A Quartic Cover of 37a1 and Its Regular S4-Closure"
subtitle: "Arithmetic geometry"
date: 2026-04-07
categories: [gen2, arithmetic, submitted]
target-journal: "Journal of Number Theory"
status: "Submitted"
repo: "the-omega-institute/branch-cubic-regular-s4-closure-prym-ray-class"
theorems: 39
featured: false
video: "https://github.com/the-omega-institute/branch-cubic-regular-s4-closure-prym-ray-class/releases/download/media-v1/branch_cubic_regular_s4_video.mp4"
slides: "https://github.com/the-omega-institute/branch-cubic-regular-s4-closure-prym-ray-class/releases/download/media-v1/branch_cubic_regular_s4_slides.pdf"
podcast: "https://github.com/the-omega-institute/branch-cubic-regular-s4-closure-prym-ray-class/releases/download/media-v1/branch_cubic_regular_s4_podcast.wav"
description: "For the conductor-37 elliptic curve, we carry out a complete explicit programme: constructing the regular S4-closure of a degree-4 map, decomposing the Jacobian via rational idempotents into a genus-2..."
---

::: {.paper-badges}
[Journal of Number Theory]{.badge-journal}
[Submitted]{.badge-status-submitted}
[39 Theorems]{.badge-theorems}
[Arithmetic geometry]{.badge-scope}
:::

## Abstract

For the conductor-37 elliptic curve, we carry out a complete explicit programme: constructing the regular S4-closure of a degree-4 map, decomposing the Jacobian via rational idempotents into a genus-2 Jacobian, a resolvent elliptic curve, and a Prym threefold.

**Keywords:** elliptic curves, Galois covers, Jacobian decomposition, Prym varieties, ray class fields

## Infographic

![branch_cubic_regular_s4 Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/papers-media-v1/branch_cubic_regular_s4_infographic.png)

## Video Explainer

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/branch-cubic-regular-s4-closure-prym-ray-class/releases/download/media-v1/branch_cubic_regular_s4_video.mp4 >}}

::: {.media-downloads}
[📊 Slides](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/branch-cubic-regular-s4-closure-prym-ray-class/releases/download/media-v1/branch_cubic_regular_s4_slides.pdf)
[🎧 Podcast](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/branch-cubic-regular-s4-closure-prym-ray-class/releases/download/media-v1/branch_cubic_regular_s4_podcast.wav)
[🎬 Video](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/branch-cubic-regular-s4-closure-prym-ray-class/releases/download/media-v1/branch_cubic_regular_s4_video.mp4)
[🖼️ Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/papers-media-v1/branch_cubic_regular_s4_infographic.png)
:::

## Paper & Source

- [Full Paper (source in this repo)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/tree/master/papers/branch-cubic-regular-s4-closure-prym-ray-class/)
- [Machine-verified proofs (Lean 4)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/automath/tree/dev-automation-integration/lean4)
- [Automath Engine](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/automath)
